title: Supervise clip preparation
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Supervise clip preparation demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Explain organisation requirements for clip preparation

pcs.text: Explain workplace standard of wool clip preparation quality and traceability requirements to the wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain workplace standard of wool clip preparation quality and traceability requirements to the wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain workplace standard of wool clip preparation quality and traceability requirements to the wool handlers.

pcs.text: Explain workplace procedures for operating safely and for the use of personal protective equipment (PPE) to the wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain workplace procedures for operating safely and for the use of personal protective equipment (PPE) to the wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain workplace procedures for operating safely and for the use of personal protective equipment (PPE) to the wool handlers.

pcs.text: Explain the impact of contamination in the wool to the wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain the impact of contamination in the wool to the wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain the impact of contamination in the wool to the wool handlers.

pcs.text: Introduce or indicate the key personnel in the wool shed or room to the wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Introduce or indicate the key personnel in the wool shed or room to the wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Introduce or indicate the key personnel in the wool shed or room to the wool handlers.

pcs.text: Allocate and explain responsibilities for specific functions or procedures to wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Allocate and explain responsibilities for specific functions or procedures to wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Allocate and explain responsibilities for specific functions or procedures to wool handlers.

pcs.text: Identify WHS hazards, assess risks and implement suitable controls
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify WHS hazards, assess risks and implement suitable controls?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify WHS hazards, assess risks and implement suitable controls.

pcs.text: Confirm that all PPE and clothing is selected, used and maintained appropriately by wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm that all PPE and clothing is selected, used and maintained appropriately by wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm that all PPE and clothing is selected, used and maintained appropriately by wool handlers.

pcs.text: Explain the importance of effective teamwork to enhance productivity and enhance cooperation, staff satisfaction and wellbeing to wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain the importance of effective teamwork to enhance productivity and enhance cooperation, staff satisfaction and wellbeing to wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain the importance of effective teamwork to enhance productivity and enhance cooperation, staff satisfaction and wellbeing to wool handlers.

pcs.text: Explain the importance of complying with animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental policies to wool handlers
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Explain the importance of complying with animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental policies to wool handlers?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Explain the importance of complying with animal welfare, biosecurity and environmental policies to wool handlers.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Explain organisation requirements for clip preparation

elements.title: Monitor wool harvesting staff performance

pcs.text: Monitor board persons' performance including picking up and throwing fleece, sweeping board and preparing non-fleece wools
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor board persons' performance including picking up and throwing fleece, sweeping board and preparing non-fleece wools?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor board persons' performance including picking up and throwing fleece, sweeping board and preparing non-fleece wools.

pcs.text: Monitor wool handlers’ performance to ensure they follow the set procedures for each of the clip preparation tasks
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor wool handlers’ performance to ensure they follow the set procedures for each of the clip preparation tasks?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor wool handlers’ performance to ensure they follow the set procedures for each of the clip preparation tasks.

pcs.text: Monitor penner-up performance to ensure mobs are handled humanely in line with animal welfare policies and kept separate, and catching pens are monitored and filled as required
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor penner-up performance to ensure mobs are handled humanely in line with animal welfare policies and kept separate, and catching pens are monitored and filled as required?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor penner-up performance to ensure mobs are handled humanely in line with animal welfare policies and kept separate, and catching pens are monitored and filled as required.

pcs.text: Monitor wool pressers' activities, including keeping wool press area clean, pressing, branding, weighing and recording bale details in the wool book
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Monitor wool pressers' activities, including keeping wool press area clean, pressing, branding, weighing and recording bale details in the wool book?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Monitor wool pressers' activities, including keeping wool press area clean, pressing, branding, weighing and recording bale details in the wool book.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Monitor wool harvesting staff performance

elements.title: Oversee preparation of wool

pcs.text: Supervise wool harvesting staff to maintain a clear board and ensure fleeces are thrown correctly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise wool harvesting staff to maintain a clear board and ensure fleeces are thrown correctly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise wool harvesting staff to maintain a clear board and ensure fleeces are thrown correctly.

pcs.text: Supervise wool harvesting staff in the removal and preparation of fleece wool
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Supervise wool harvesting staff in the removal and preparation of fleece wool?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Supervise wool harvesting staff in the removal and preparation of fleece wool.
